products.name: Check Engine Light Diagnostic Scan
products.description: Full OBD2 diagnostic scan. Pull all stored + pending trouble codes, explain what each means, identify likely root causes (sensor / mechanical / electrical). 15-30 min on-site at your location. Mobile service Vaughan / Woodbridge / GTA.

products.name: BMW / Audi Coding & Feature Unlock
products.description: Unlock hidden features on your BMW or Audi via professional coding. One session, unlimited features. Examples: auto-fold mirrors, cornering fog lights, sport gauge cluster, lap timer (BMW M), comfort blinkers, disable seatbelt chime, video in motion, digital speed display, welcome lights, and more. Dealer-level results without the dealer price. Mobile service Vaughan / Woodbridge / GTA.
